overall.description: A first-person walk through an abandoned urban waterfront district at sunset, featuring the 'Wild Blue' building, a roller coaster structure, and overgrown boardwalks. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showing a post-apocalyptic atmosphere with burning vehicles, scattered debris, and warm golden hour lighting.

events.description: passing burning car with thick black smoke on the left side
slight turn to the right while approaching the overpass area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete path, observing the abandoned urban environment and burning wreckage

entered.detail: tall commercial building with prominent teal neon 'WILD BLUE' signage and large digital billboard
wrecked vehicle engulfed in flames with thick smoke rising
large steel lattice roller coaster framework silhouetted against the sunset sky
elevated highway or monorail track crossing above the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a deserted urban street at golden hour, with the camera moving past a burning car toward an overpass. The 'Wild Blue' building dominates the left side with its neon signage, while a massive roller coaster structure looms on the right. Smoke drifts across the scene as the camera advances along the cracked concrete walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown plaza with scattered palm trees

events.description: turning right off the main street into an open overgrown area with palm trees
ground surface transitions from dirt to wooden stairs and boardwalk

agents.ego_description: turning right into a more open plaza area, navigating through overgrown vegetation and palm trees toward a wooden walkway

entered.detail: street sign reading 'Pacific Blvd' mounted on a low wall
contemporary building with pink and blue neon signage and vertical light strips
weathered wooden steps leading down to a lower boardwalk level

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right into a wide, abandoned plaza overtaken by weeds and palm trees. The 'Wild Blue' building falls behind as a modern building with neon lights appears on the right. The ground transitions from concrete to dirt and gravel as the camera approaches a wooden staircase leading downward.

events.description: descending wooden stairs onto a weathered boardwalk surrounded by tall grass
approaching a covered walkway structure with the 'NO IMPERIAL MALL' sign becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking along a dilapidated wooden boardwalk, navigating through overgrown vegetation while approaching a covered structure

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a raised walkway through the overgrown area
illuminated orange signage reading 'NO IMPERIAL MALL' on the large metal framework building
roofed pedestrian passage with open sides leading toward the waterfront

segments.scene_description: The camera descends onto a wooden boardwalk cutting through tall grass and weeds. The path leads toward a covered walkway, with the 'NO IMPERIAL MALL' sign glowing orange on a large industrial building to the left. The roller coaster structure remains visible in the distance as the sun sets directly ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under building overhang

events.description: entering covered walkway creates dramatic shift from bright sunset to shadowed interior
exiting the covered structure back into open air with direct view of the waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking under a covered structure with wooden pillars, transitioning from shadow back into the golden sunset light

entered.detail: large industrial building with exposed metal framework and illuminated signage
open view of the ocean horizon with the sun setting over the water

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered walkway with wooden support beams, creating a temporary shadow before emerging back into the golden sunset light. The 'NO IMPERIAL MALL' building looms large on the left, while the open waterfront and ocean horizon become visible ahead. The wooden planks continue through this transitional space.

events.description: approaching the coastline with clear view of the ocean and setting sun

agents.ego_description: walking along the open waterfront boardwalk, approaching the ocean shoreline with the sun setting directly ahead

entered.detail: calm sea horizon with the sun setting directly over the water, creating a golden reflection
derelict market stalls or small buildings along the right side of the boardwalk

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges onto an open waterfront promenade with unobstructed views of the ocean and the setting sun. The roller coaster structure is visible in the far distance to the left, while abandoned stalls line the right side. The wooden boardwalk continues toward the water's edge as the golden hour light bathes the entire scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a smoke-filled urban street into a desolate, overgrown plaza during the golden hour. It begins by advancing along a cracked concrete walkway, passing a burning car while the neon signage of the Wild Blue building and a massive roller coaster structure frame the path. As the camera moves toward an overpass, the scene shifts right, leaving the Wild Blue building behind to enter a wide open space where weeds and palm trees have reclaimed the land. The environment then transitions from concrete to dirt and gravel as a modern neon-lit building emerges on the right, before the camera finally approaches a wooden staircase leading downward.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a weed-choked boardwalk toward an expansive, sun-drenched waterfront. It begins by descending onto a wooden path cutting through tall grass, moving toward a covered walkway while the orange glow of a NO IMPERIAL MALL sign illuminates a large industrial building to the left. As the camera enters the covered walkway, the scene briefly dips into shadow beneath wooden support beams before emerging back into the brilliant golden light of the sunset. The view then opens wide onto a waterfront promenade, where the industrial structures give way to abandoned stalls and an unobstructed horizon of the ocean. Finally, the camera advances toward the water's edge, with the distant silhouette of a roller coaster framing the landscape under the warm glow of the golden hour.
